transactions.description: Atlanta Braves recalled RHP JR Ritchie from Gwinnett Stripers.
Toronto Blue Jays activated RHP Dylan Cease from the 15-day injured list.
Colorado Rockies selected the contract of OF Cole Carrigg from Albuquerque Isotopes.
C C.J. Stubbs assigned to New Hampshire Fisher Cats from Buffalo Bisons.
Buffalo Bisons placed LF RJ Schreck on the 7-day injured list.
Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders placed RHP Eric Reyzelman on the 7-day injured list.
